title: 2010-2015 Lexus RX350 RX450h Low Beam HID Headlight Bulb Replacement Instructions
description: Replace the low beam HID headlight bulb on 2010-2015 Lexus RX350 and RX450h, including engine cover removal and spring clip retention.
tips: HID bulbs run at very high voltage — disconnect the battery negative terminal before starting to avoid electrocution.
On the RX450h hybrid, remove the fuse relay box by pulling the tab to gain access to the headlight area.
Note the orientation of the round gray cover before removing it — the long tab should point vertically up.
When pushing trim clip retainers in, you must pop them back out afterward or they won't hold properly.
The HID bulb has a large square notch and a small semi-circular notch — align these with the matching cutouts in the headlight housing.
The connector and cover both remove counterclockwise (viewed from the rear) and reinstall clockwise.
Make sure the hook on the engine cover engages with its cutout when reinstalling.
